description_long: This modern house is situated within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a mix of flat and shed roofs, and a combination of dark and light exterior materials. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, with a prominent black garage at the front, large windows, and a central courtyard area. The property includes a paved driveway, a swimming pool in the backyard, and landscaped areas with clusters of trees and shrubs, especially at the corners. The house has both single and double-height sections, with the taller volume set back from the street. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing a contemporary aesthetic, and the entryway is marked by a small set of steps leading to a recessed door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of privacy and openness.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with flat and shed roofs, large windows, a black garage, and a backyard pool, all set within a fenced, landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black garage, main entryway with steps, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, backyard patio, and the asymmetrical arrangement of the house volumes.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, rear facade with large windows, and the taller section of the house set back from the main structure.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the driveway, garage, and the transition between the front and rear outdoor spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with small steps, minimal overhang, and a clean, modern aesthetic
